title: Goodyear 5 L Screenwash Blue -Anti smear formula| Helps remove traffic film and insects all year| Safe on paintwork| All seasons| Economical formula designed to ensure high visibility driving
features: Anti-Smear Formula for Clear Visibility: The Goodyear 5L Screenwash Blue is formulated with an advanced anti-smear technology that ensures your windshield remains crystal clear. This powerful formula effectively prevents smudges and streaks, providing you with enhanced visibility and a safer driving experience, day or night.

Removes Traffic Film and Insects: Engineered to tackle tough road grime, this screenwash is perfect for removing stubborn traffic film, insects, and other debris that can accumulate on your windshield. Whether you’re driving through city streets or on the open highway, this screenwash ensures your windshield stays clean and clear.

Safe on Paintwork and Wiper Blades: Goodyear's screenwash is gentle on your vehicle’s exterior, making it safe for use on all types of paintwork. The carefully balanced formula not only cleans your windshield but also protects your car's finish from potential damage and ensuring they remain in top condition while providing optimal cleaning performance.

Refreshing Blue: Adding to its practical benefits, the Goodyear 5L Screenwash blue also features a pleasant blue refreshing that enhances your driving experience. The fresh, fruity scent helps to neutralize unpleasant odors, making every drive more enjoyable while leaving your car smelling fresh and clean.

Economical and Long-Lasting: With a generous 5-liter capacity, this screenwash offers excellent value for money. The economical formula is designed to last, providing multiple uses and ensuring you have enough screenwash on hand for months of driving. It's an ideal choice for those who want a reliable, cost-effective solution to maintain windshield clarity.
description: Product Description Experience crystal-clear visibility with Goodyear 5 L Screenwash Blue, a powerful and versatile cleaning solution designed to keep your windshield spotless in all seasons. Formulated with an advanced anti-smear technology, this screenwash effectively removes traffic film, dirt, and insect residue, ensuring that your windshield remains streak-free for safer driving. Whether you're navigating through urban streets or cruising on the highway, this screenwash helps you maintain optimal visibility, enhancing your driving safety and comfort. The Goodyear 5 L Screenwash Cherry is not only efficient but also safe for your vehicle's paintwork. Its gentle yet effective formula is designed to clean without causing any damage or discoloration to your car’s exterior. You can confidently use it throughout the year, knowing that it won’t harm your vehicle's finish. This screenwash is ready to use straight from the bottle, making it a convenient solution for busy drivers who need a quick and reliable way to keep their windshields clear. Perfect for all seasons, Goodyear's screenwash is an essential addition to your car care routine. Its powerful cleaning action ensures that even the most stubborn grime, including bug splatter and road film, is effortlessly removed. Whether it's the heat of summer or the chill of winter, this screenwash is formulated to perform under various weather conditions, giving you peace of mind no matter where your journey takes you. Economical and effective, the Goodyear 5 L Screenwash Cherry is designed to provide long-lasting performance. Ingredients 5% Ethanol
